proof: function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real], x3: Pair[Real, Real]) { (r2_left_of_line(x0, x1, x2) and r2_left_of_line(x0, x1, x3) or (r2_right_of_line(x0, x1, x2) and r2_right_of_line(x0, x1, x3))) = r2_same_strict_side(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(a, b, p, q)

function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real], x3: Pair[Real, Real]) { (r2_left_of_line(x0, x1, x2) and r2_left_of_line(x0, x1, x3) or (r2_right_of_line(x0, x1, x2) and r2_right_of_line(x0, x1, x3))) = r2_same_strict_side(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(r2_translate(a, v), r2_translate(b, v), r2_translate(p, v), r2_translate(q, v))

function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real], x3: Pair[Real, Real]) { (r2_left_of_line(x0, x1, x2) and r2_right_of_line(x0, x1, x3) or (r2_right_of_line(x0, x1, x2) and r2_left_of_line(x0, x1, x3))) = r2_opposite_strict_sides(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(a, b, p, q)

function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real], x3: Pair[Real, Real]) { (r2_left_of_line(x0, x1, x2) and r2_right_of_line(x0, x1, x3) or (r2_right_of_line(x0, x1, x2) and r2_left_of_line(x0, x1, x3))) = r2_opposite_strict_sides(x0, x1, x2, x3) }(r2_translate(a, v), r2_translate(b, v), r2_translate(p, v), r2_translate(q, v))
